mapper.sql: user_id, user_name, email, phone, status, create_time, update_time, last_login_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user ( user_name, email, phone, status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{userName}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW() )

INSERT INTO user ( user_name, email, phone, status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{user.userName}, #{user.email}, #{user.phone}, #{user.status}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE user
user_name = #{userName},
email = #{email},
phone = #{phone},
status = #{status},
last_login_time = #{lastLoginTime},
update_time = NOW()
WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user SET status = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select:
SELECT u.user_id, u.user_name, u.email, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders o WHERE o.user_id = u.user_id) AS order_count, (SELECT SUM(o.amount) FROM orders o WHERE o.user_id = u.user_id) AS total_amount FROM user u WHERE u.status = 1
AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders o WHERE o.user_id = u.user_id) >= #{minOrderCount}
ORDER BY
order_count DESC
total_amount DESC
u.create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM user WHERE user_id = #{userId} FOR UPDATE
